rememberMe.title: Remember me (60 days)
rememberMe.subtitle: Keeps you signed in on this device. Your 60-day timer resets while you're logged in.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.message: You do not have permission to open this page.

errors.accountLocked: Account is locked. Please contact admin.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.noPermission: You don't have permission to view this page
